entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop being studied for production in semi-arid tropics and molecular linkage mapping.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographic region where pearl millet is produced.

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The heterothallic pathogen that causes Downy mildew in pearl millet.

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A biotic constraint and disease caused by Sclerospora graminicola.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand virulent isolates of the pathogen.

entities.name: RESISTANCE BREEDING
entities.description: The process of breeding plants to incorporate resistance to pathogens.

entities.name: OLIGOGENIC TRAITS
entities.description: Traits controlled by a small number of genes.

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAITS
entities.description: Traits controlled by multiple genes, often showing continuous variation.

entities.name: GENETIC MARKER TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Technology used to identify and manipulate oligogenic and quantitative traits.

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used to generate genotypic data for linkage mapping.

entities.name: LINKAGE MAPPING
entities.description: The process of constructing a molecular map of genetic loci on a chromosome.

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED POPULATION
entities.description: A mapping population of 295 individuals used for the construction of the linkage map.

entities.name: CROSS 81B-P13 X AIMP 92901-DERIV-P03
entities.description: The specific parental cross used to develop the recombinant inbred population.

entities.name: MAP MAKER/EXP
entities.description: Software version 3.0b used to construct the skeleton linkage map.

entities.name: LOD THRESHOLD
entities.description: The statistical value of 3.0 used to determine the significance of linkage.

entities.name: MAP CHART
entities.description: Software version 2.2 used to draw the linkage map.

entities.name: LINKAGE GROUPS
entities.description: Groups of linked markers on a chromosome, with seven groups identified in this study.
